ocr.text: In the study of correlations involving molecular markers, the first header "Molecular marker" includes the sub-header
"Compartment" followed by "Tumor" and "Stroma" for Akt, PI3K, HIF1α, and VEGF-A.
Molecular marker  Akt  PI3K  HIF1α  VEGF-A
Compartment  Tumor  Stroma  Tumor  Stroma  Tumor  Stroma  Tumor  Stroma
A: Correlations in all 335 patients
B: Correlations in 232 node-negative patients
C: Correlations in 103 node-positive patients
Under the section labeled "A: Correlations in all 335 patients," the marker miR-21 shows a Tumor correlation of P = 0.700 for
Akt, P = 0.488 for PI3K, P = 0.687 for HIF1α, and P = 0.751 for VEGF-A, while the Stroma correlations are P = 0.217 for Akt,
P = 0.655 for PI3K, P = 0.251 for HIF1α, and P = 0.622 for VEGF-A. In section "B: Correlations in 232 node-negative
patients," miR-21 presents a Tumor correlation of P = 0.736 for Akt, P = 0.566 for PI3K, P = 0.473 for HIF1α, and P = 0.945 for
VEGF-A, with the Stroma showing P = 0.692 for Akt, P = 473 for PI3K, P = 0.685 for HIF1α, and P = 0.272 for VEGF-A.
Lastly, in section "C: Correlations in 103 node-positive patients," miR-21 reports a Tumor correlation of P = 0.735 for Akt, P =
0.701 for PI3K, P = 0.751 for HIF1α, and P = 0.685 for VEGF-A, while Stroma correlations are P = 0.112 for Akt, P = 0.722 for
PI3K, P = 0.144 for HIF1α, and P = 0.192 for VEGF-A.
